query:
-- How many service-matched billing items have a service_billing_assignment record
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withAssignment,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingAssignment,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemId = bi.id
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL;
